title: Record live tool bullet spectacle and tighter tool-result budgets
prompt: Create reports/tool-bullet-budget-density.md with sections for Live tool bullets, Result budget, Preview budget, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Tool Bullet Budget Density Contract

## Live tool bullets
in-flight tool cards use gradient/pulse bullets so long work stays visibly alive without expand

## Result budget
live tool outputs persist earlier at 36k chars to protect long-session context headroom

## Preview budget
oversize tool previews keep 1.2k chars so transcripts stay glanceable

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + tool-call/tool budget vitest + live TUI tool cards
